common_phrases.declaration_text: I hereby declare that the above information is true to the best of my knowledge.

example_bullets: Increased sales revenue by 25% within 6 months through implementation of targeted marketing strategies
Led a cross-functional team of 15 members to successfully deliver project 2 months ahead of schedule
Developed a Machine Learning model using Python that improved sales forecasts by 30%
Reduced processing time by 40% through automation of manual workflows using RPA
Managed a portfolio worth ₹10 crore, achieving 95% client satisfaction rating
Implemented AWS cloud migration for 50+ applications, reducing infrastructure costs by 35%
Spearheaded digital marketing campaign that boosted user engagement by 72%
Coordinated launch of new product line generating ₹5 Cr revenue in first quarter
Optimized production process reducing errors by 40% and improving efficiency by 25%
Trained and mentored 20+ junior developers in Agile methodologies and best practices

formatting_rules.bullet_start: Use action verbs (Achieved, Led, Developed, etc.)
formatting_rules.no_pronouns: Avoid using 'I', 'me', or 'my' - start directly with action verbs
formatting_rules.formal_tone: Professional and formal tone using Indian English conventions
formatting_rules.metrics: Always include numbers, percentages, and rupee amounts (₹) where applicable
formatting_rules.quantify: Quantify achievements with specific data and business impact
formatting_rules.british_spelling: Use British spellings (analysed, optimise, organised) common in Indian English
